title:

SVG: Doctor figure (24 paths: head circle, hair detail arc, neck rect, white coat body, collar V-shape, pocket rect, stethoscope arc, stethoscope earpiece dots Г—2, stethoscope chest piece circle, hands Г—2 simplified, clipboard rect, clipboard lines Г—3, cross emblem on coat pocket, medical cross on background panel) вЂ” full figure at 960Г—540px, 280px tall

White coat fill: #FFFFFF

Pocket cross fill: #EF4444

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Doctor figure standing front-facing, centered. Slightly friendly tilt (+3В°). Clipboard in one hand. Stethoscope around neck.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (4.0s total):
0вЂ“0.5s: Background + body silhouette fades in (scale 0.9 в†’ 1.0, ease-out spring).
0.5вЂ“0.8s: White coat fills in (opacity 0 в†’ 1.0, ease-out).
0.8вЂ“1.0s: Head, hair, skin elements appear (scale 0в†’1.0, spring).
1.0вЂ“1.3s: Coat details: collar, pocket, cross вЂ” each fades in (0.06s stagger, ease-out).
1.3вЂ“1.6s: Stethoscope draws from neck down (dashoffset 100%в†’0%, ease-out) вЂ” arc path draws first, then earpieces and chest piece appear.
1.6вЂ“1.9s: Clipboard slides in from side (X: +40px в†’ 0, ease-out).
1.9вЂ“2.2s: Clipboard lines appear (each draws leftв†’right, 0.08s stagger, ease-out).
2.2вЂ“2.6s: Medical cross on pocket pulses (scale 1.0 в†’ 1.2 в†’ 1.0, spring, #EF4444 glow 0в†’8pxв†’0).
2.6вЂ“3.2s: Doctor figure does slight friendly nod (rotateZ: 0В° в†’ -3В° в†’ 3В° в†’ 0В°, ease-in-out, natural movement).

- Detail stagger: ease-out
